description.en: Contains a string indicating the URL of theSTUNorTURNserver used to gather the candidate, ornullif the candidate was not gathered from a server.

description.en: A string indicating the URL of the STUN or TURN server with which the error occurred.

description.en: A string specifying the URL of theICEserver from which the described candidate was obtained. This property isonlyavailable for local candidates.

excerpt.es: A string specifying the URL of theICEserver from which the described candidate was obtained. This property isonlyavailable for local candidates.
excerpt.en: A string specifying the URL of theICEserver from which the described candidate was obtained. This property isonlyavailable for local candidates.

description.en: A string containing a randomly-generated username fragment ("ice-ufrag") which ICE uses for message integrity along with a randomly-generated password ("ice-pwd"). You can use this string to verify generations of ICE generation; each generation of the same ICE process will use the sameusernameFragment, even across ICE restarts.
